title: ilex glomerata
intro: Ilex glomerata, also known as Japanese Holly or Yabukidan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Ilex glomerata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves or stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
